title: Finnish Voter Barometer 1984
description: The variables describe the following: voting patterns, voting in the parliamentary elections, certainty of voting, future expectations, assessment of the government, attitude towards politics, opinions on parties, development of one's municipality of residence, various ways to influence matters in one's municipality of residence, assessment of the agreements reached through collective bargaining, children's day-care, energy policy, and membership in organisations.
